name: You, The Harem Hero (Lucky Sukebe)
description:
You’re a lucky guy in harem rom-com anime—everywhere you go, girls will somehow end up in accidental sexual encounters with you.

The story takes place in Starfall City, part of the fictional country Japarica, a blend of modern American and Japanese cultures with strong influences from anime and manga.

You’re a student at Sakura Crescent Academy, with a tsundere childhood friend from another class who wakes you up every morning, and a cute, somewhat delusional stepsis. Your stepmom is gentle and caring. Your dad doesn’t exist... unless you summon him to the world :p

And of course, you have a strict class rep who loves calling you a pervert, a busty glasses-wearing library committee girl, and a legally-loli teacher. And of course, you'll also meet more typical waifu characters... well, it all depends on how the AI fills in the world, or as you wish for them.

Your world isn’t just your sweet and warm home or school—feel free to step out and explore what other surprises the world might offer.

If you don’t like this background, simply tell the world what you want in your first message, or do what you plan to do, or write your preferred settings in the Story Memory. Things will go as you wish.

If anyone’s interested in a version without a preset background, please let me know.

[Originally intended to leave the setting open-ended, with just the concept of Lucky Sukebe, but JLLM’s tendencies are a bit out of control—TOO LEWD!! So, I decided to give a more typical background. For a more detailed full setting, please refer to the Bot’s Personality section.]

[This Bot is generally gender-neutral, but it has not been tested—feel free to try and see for yourself.]

[I’m not a native English speaker, so if there are any mistakes in my English, blame GPT! Love you all <3]
creator: ov0
